response_text:
I understand the protocol. I'm ready to orchestrate Experiment 3 as the SCOUT delegate runner.

Let me confirm my understanding of the key constraints:

✅ **Blinding:** I will NOT read `label-map.json` during execution or include model names in filenames/instructions  
✅ **Sequential execution:** Run delegates one at a time (no parallelism)  
✅ **Fixed task:** All delegates work on clouatre-labs/aptu#737  
✅ **Read-only:** SCOUT agents produce JSON analysis only, no code changes  
✅ **Latency tracking:** Record start/end timestamps for all 20 runs  
✅ **Retry logic:** Up to 5 attempts per run if JSON validation fails  
✅ **Stopping point:** After all 20 runs, verify outputs and STOP—no scoring in this session  

### Ready to begin. Executing setup:

```bash
cd ~/git/dotfiles
EXP_DIR=experiments/exp3-model-comparison
mkdir -p $EXP_DIR/sessions

# Record aptu HEAD SHA
APTU_SHA=$(gh api repos/clouatre-labs/aptu/commits/main --jq '.sha')
echo "aptu SHA: $APTU_SHA"

# Seal label-map.json (will not read this)
cat > $EXP_DIR/label-map.json << 'EOF'
{
  "01": "haiku-4.5",
  "02": "haiku-4.5",
  "03": "haiku-4.5",
  "04": "haiku-4.5",
  "05": "haiku-4.5",
  "06": "qwen3-coder",
  "07": "qwen3-coder",
  "08": "qwen3-coder",
  "09": "qwen3-coder",
  "10": "qwen3-coder",
  "11": "gemini-3-flash",
  "12": "gemini-3-flash",
  "13": "gemini-3-flash",
  "14": "gemini-3-flash",
  "15": "gemini-3-flash",
  "16": "devstral-2512",
  "17": "devstral-2512",
  "18": "devstral-2512",
  "19": "devstral-2512",
  "20": "devstral-2512"
}
EOF
echo "label-map.json sealed"
```

**Awaiting setup confirmation. Once confirmed, I will begin Stage 1 (Runs 01-05) with baseline delegates.**
